mapper.select: INSERT INTO PAYMENT_CANCEL ( CURRENT_TRX_NO, ORIGINAL_TRX_NO, ORIGINAL_ATTEMPT_SEQ, CANCEL_STATUS ) VALUES ( #{cancel.posTrx}, #{cancel.originalPosTrx}, #{cancel.originalAttemptSeq}, #{cancel.cancelStatusValue} ) RETURNING CURRENT_TRX_NO AS posTrx, ORIGINAL_TRX_NO AS originalPosTrx, ORIGINAL_ATTEMPT_SEQ AS originalAttemptSeq, CANCEL_STATUS AS cancelStatus, CANCEL_APPROVAL_NO AS cancelApprovalNo, DECLINE_CODE AS declineCode;

UPDATE PAYMENT_CANCEL SET CANCEL_STATUS = #{cancel.cancelStatusValue}, CANCEL_APPROVAL_NO = #{cancel.cancelApprovalNo}, DECLINE_CODE = #{cancel.declineCode}, UPDATED_AT = STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now') WHERE CURRENT_TRX_NO = #{cancel.posTrx} AND ORIGINAL_TRX_NO = #{cancel.originalPosTrx} AND ORIGINAL_ATTEMPT_SEQ = #{cancel.originalAttemptSeq} AND CANCEL_STATUS = 'PENDING' RETURNING CURRENT_TRX_NO AS posTrx, ORIGINAL_TRX_NO AS originalPosTrx, ORIGINAL_ATTEMPT_SEQ AS originalAttemptSeq, CANCEL_STATUS AS cancelStatus, CANCEL_APPROVAL_NO AS cancelApprovalNo, DECLINE_CODE AS declineCode

SELECT A.FINAL_STATUS AS finalStatus, A.APPROVAL_NO AS approvalNo, A.DECLINE_CODE AS declineCode, A.CARD_BIN AS cardBin, A.CARD_LAST4 AS cardLast4, A.ATTEMPT_SEQ AS attemptSeq, A.AMOUNT AS amount, A.VAN_TRX_ID AS vanTrxId FROM PAYMENT_ATTEMPT A WHERE 1 = 1 and A.POS_TRX = #{posTrx} AND A.ATTEMPT_SEQ = #{attemptSeq} LIMIT 1

SELECT C.CURRENT_TRX_NO AS posTrx, C.ORIGINAL_TRX_NO AS originalPosTrx, C.ORIGINAL_ATTEMPT_SEQ AS originalAttemptSeq, C.CANCEL_STATUS AS cancelStatus, C.CANCEL_APPROVAL_NO AS cancelApprovalNo, C.DECLINE_CODE AS declineCode FROM PAYMENT_CANCEL C WHERE 1 = 1 and C.ORIGINAL_TRX_NO = #{originalPosTrx} AND C.ORIGINAL_ATTEMPT_SEQ = #{originalAttemptSeq} LIMIT 1
